title: Mortgage rates sink again, and homebuyers jump back in
summary: Mortgage rates are declining, spurring renewed demand from homebuyers seeking more affordable financing. The development signals improving conditions for residential real estate transactions.
content: Mortgage demand continues to rebound as rates move slightly lower.

zh.title: 抵押贷款利率再跌，购房者重新入场
zh.summary: 抵押贷款利率下降，激发了购房者对更优惠融资的需求。这一发展预示着住宅房产交易环境的改善。

title: Gen Z college students are looking for scholarships on TikTok. There's a better way, experts say
summary: Gen Z students increasingly turn to TikTok to find college scholarships, but consumer advocates warn this approach carries significant risks. Experts recommend more vetted financial resources for scholarship searches.
content: There are more trustworthy places than social media to search for college scholarships, consumer advocates said. Here's what to know.

zh.title: Z世代大学生在TikTok上寻找奖学金，专家说有更好的办法
zh.summary: Z世代学生越来越多地通过TikTok寻找大学奖学金，但消费者权益保护倡导者警告此方法存在重大风险。专家建议使用更加可信的金融资源进行奖学金搜索。

title: Retail traders can now get long OpenAI as Robinhood's venture fund takes a stake
summary: Robinhood's venture fund has invested $75 million in OpenAI, allowing retail traders direct exposure to the AI company for the first time. The move democratizes access to high-value AI investments previously limited to institutional investors.
content: Robinhood's proprietary investment vehicle has taken a $75 million stake in OpenAI, the trading company announced Wednesday.

zh.title: Robinhood风险基金入股OpenAI，零售交易者现可参与
zh.summary: Robinhood的风险投资基金向OpenAI投入7500万美元，首次使零售交易者能够直接接触这家AI公司。此举将以前仅限于机构投资者的高价值AI投资机会民主化。

title: When dentists start getting cold calls about private credit, you know the fad has peaked
summary: Private credit investments are being aggressively marketed to non-financial professionals like dentists, signaling the sector may be reaching peak popularity. The broadening pitch suggests yields may be inflated relative to actual risk.
content: Promise of excess yield and the “safety” of a bond lures retail investors — but what looks too good to be true often is.

zh.title: 当牙医开始接到关于私人信贷的冷电话时，你就知道这股风潮已经过去了
zh.summary: 私人信贷投资正在积极向非金融专业人士（如牙医）推销，这表明该行业可能正在达到流行的顶峰。推销范围的扩大表明收益率相对于实际风险可能被夸大了。

title: Google debuts two new custom chips in latest bid to challenge Nvidia’s dominance
summary: Google has launched new custom TPU chips designed to challenge Nvidia's market dominance with improved cost efficiency and storage capabilities. The chips represent Google's ongoing effort to build competitive AI infrastructure.
content: The new TPUs offer cost advantages and improved storage functions.

zh.summary: 谷歌推出了新的定制TPU芯片，旨在通过改进的成本效率和存储能力来挑战英伟达的市场主导地位。这些芯片代表了谷歌持续建立有竞争力的人工智能基础设施的努力。

title: Why Strategy’s stock is outperforming bitcoin these days
summary: Strategy's stock exhibits extreme sensitivity to bitcoin price movements, creating binary profit outcomes tied to cryptocurrency trading around its holding's average cost. The correlation makes the stock a leveraged cryptocurrency play.
content: Strategy’s stock shows extreme sensitivity when bitcoin is trading around the average price of its cryptocurrency holding. Profitability is binary

zh.title: 为什么策略股票目前表现超过比特币
zh.summary: 策略股票对比特币价格变动表现出极端敏感性，根据其持有的平均成本在加密货币交易周围创造二元利润结果。这种关联使该股票成为杠杆加密货币投资。

title: The U.S. stock market is progressing toward a bubble — and here’s where the extremes are right now
summary: Bank of America analysts warn the U.S. stock market is showing bubble characteristics with significant valuation extremes in certain sectors. The analysis pinpoints where the greatest froth currently exists.

title: Emerging-market stocks are back on top in April after punishing Iran selloff. Why they can keep on climbing.
summary: An emerging markets ETF surged in April following selling pressure tied to Iran tensions, though it remains underperforming the S&P 500 since the conflict escalated. The rebound suggests renewed confidence in emerging market opportunities.
content: A popular exchange-traded fund that tracks stocks in emerging markets has surged in April — but the ETF is still trailing the S&P 500 since the start of the Iran conflict.

zh.title: 新兴市场股票在伊朗抛售后在四月重新回到顶部。为什么它们能继续上升。

title: Google unveils chips for AI training and inference in latest shot at Nvidia
summary: Google unveiled AI chips designed specifically for training and inference workloads with significant on-chip memory capacity. The announcement escalates Google's competitive challenge against Nvidia's AI chip leadership.
content: Google is packing ample amounts of static random access memory into a dedicated chip for running artificial intelligence models, following Nvidia's plans.

title: Investors rediscover a taste for extremely speculative stocks as market rips higher in April
summary: While mega-cap tech stocks recovered in April, the market's biggest winners are smaller, highly speculative companies. The shift reveals investors' appetite for significantly riskier bets as the market rebounds.
content: “Magnificent Seven” tech stocks are finally riding high once again in April after a months-long bout of underperformance. Yet the real winners of the April stock-market rebound — at least, so far — are in the smaller, and far more speculative camp.

title: Why the confusion around the Iran situation could get worse. How to profit anyway
summary: Uncertainty about Iran's current political leadership creates ongoing market volatility and potential profit opportunities. The ambiguity surrounding actual power structures presents both tactical and strategic investment angles.

title: Apple’s new CEO is a hardware legend. That didn’t save Intel investors — and it won’t guarantee an AI win.

summary: UK inflation figures reveal the first official impact of the Iran war on the cost of living. Geopolitical disruption to energy markets is directly affecting consumer prices across the economy.

title: UK inflation jumps to 3.3% in March as fuel prices surge amid Iran war
summary: UK inflation jumped to 3.3% in March with fuel prices experiencing their largest increase in over three years, driven by the Iran conflict. The sharp spike demonstrates the immediate economic fallout from Middle East instability.

summary: European stocks are expected to decline as investors weigh the Iran ceasefire extension and Trump's continued Strait of Hormuz blockade. The prolonged blockade maintains uncertainty about global energy supplies.

title: War in Iran 'has put up our fuel bill by £100,000'

summary: Charities report 35% fuel price increases due to the Iran conflict have severely impacted logistics and operations. Essential organizations struggle to maintain services as transportation costs rise.

summary: North Lincolnshire Council is promoting a support scheme to help households manage rising heating oil costs from the Iran war. Government assistance programs aim to protect vulnerable populations from energy price shocks.

title: Hormuz is just a ‘dry run’ if China and U.S. go to war in the Pacific, Singapore foreign minister warns
summary: Singapore's foreign minister warns that the Strait of Hormuz blockade serves as a preview of potential U.S.-China conflict in the Pacific. The commentary highlights escalating geopolitical tensions beyond the Middle East.

title: World's biggest maker of condoms set to raise prices due to Iran war
